evals.prompt: How do I build a multi-step onboarding journey in Braze for new app users?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to creating a Canvas Flow with action-based entry, message steps, delays, and decision splits

assertions.name: mentions_canvas_flow
assertions.description: Response must reference Canvas Flow (not Campaign) as the tool for multi-step journeys

assertions.name: includes_entry_trigger
assertions.description: Response must explain setting up an action-based or session-start entry trigger

assertions.name: multi_channel_steps
assertions.description: Response must include multiple channel types in the journey (e.g., push + email + in-app)

evals.prompt: I need to set up Braze Currents to stream engagement events to our Snowflake data warehouse
evals.expected_output: Guide to configuring Currents export to Snowflake with event selection

assertions.name: currents_setup_path
assertions.description: Response must reference the dashboard path for Currents configuration (Data Settings > Currents)

assertions.name: event_types
assertions.description: Response must mention specific event types available for streaming (email opens, push clicks, purchases, etc.)

assertions.name: snowflake_option
assertions.description: Response must mention both Currents and Snowflake Data Sharing as options for getting data to Snowflake

evals.prompt: How do I use the Braze API to trigger a campaign with dynamic user-specific data?
evals.expected_output: API call example using POST /campaigns/trigger/send with trigger_properties

assertions.name: correct_endpoint
assertions.description: Response must reference POST /campaigns/trigger/send as the endpoint

assertions.name: auth_header
assertions.description: Response must show Bearer token authorization header

assertions.name: trigger_properties
assertions.description: Response must demonstrate using trigger_properties to pass dynamic per-user data
